reviews.review_msg: Brent is a fun, enthusiastic professor who makes every class interesting. His class is pretty interactive, and participation was the main differentiating factor for who got A's in our class (so speak up!). Reading the weekly cases is mandatory to be able to participate.

Brent is a joy to be around. Even classes on a Monday morning at 9:30AM are less dreadful with him. He's enthusiastic and super adorable (both looks and personality). If you can take a class with him, do it! Definitely one of my favourite professors ever :)
